title: My More Enchantments
body:
Here's a detailed description of the 26 enchantments and their effects at different levels based on the code:

1. Time Slash
Function: Deals bonus damage and teleports targets back in time when attacking after >2s intervals.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 2s time rewind, +2 damage
Lvl 2: 3s time rewind, +4 damage
Lvl 3: 4s time rewind, +6 damage
   
2. Soul Siphon
Function: Gains stacks from kills to boost damage.
Level Effects:
All levels: +0.1 damage per stack (max 150 stacks)
   
3. Whisper (Bow)
Function: Bypasses armor and deals true damage.
Level Effects:
All levels: Converts damage to armor-ignoring +4 fixed damage
   
4. Tidal Surge (Trident)
Function: Creates water columns and launches enemies.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 1.3x vertical knockback
Lvl 2: 1.6x vertical knockback
Lvl 3: 1.9x vertical knockback
   
5. Winter Chill
Function: Applies slow and creates snow.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: Slow I (10s), 3 snow blocks
Lvl 2: Slow II (10s), 6 snow blocks
Lvl 3: Slow III (10s), 9 snow blocks
   
6. Sanction
Function: Deals bonus damage to enemies >50% HP.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 1.4x damage
Lvl 2: 1.8x damage
Lvl 3: 2.2x damage
   
7. Judgment
Function: Deals bonus damage to enemies ≤50% HP.
Level Effects:
Same scaling as Sanction
   
8. Life Steal
Function: Heals percentage of damage dealt.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 20% lifesteal
Lvl 2: 40% lifesteal
Lvl 3: 60% lifesteal
   
9. Critical Strike
Function: Chance for 3x damage.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 25% chance
Lvl 2: 50% chance
Lvl 3: 75% chance
    
10. Mercy
Function: Damage scales with missing health.
Level Effects:
Per level: +2% damage per 1% maximum HP
    
11. Soul Strike
Function: Deals bonus damage based on enemies' HP.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: +1% max HP as damage
Lvl 2: +2% max HP as damage
Lvl 3: +3% max HP as damage
    
12. Fortitude
Function: Flat damage reduction.
Level Effects:
Per level: -2 damage taken
    
13. Vent Fury
Function: Area damage burst when hit.
Level Effects:
Damage scales with other enchantment synergies
    
14. Dodge
Function: Chance to teleport-dodge attacks.
Level Effects:
Per level: +4% dodge chance
    
15. Holy Protection
Function: Increases max health.
Level Effects:
Per level: +2 max HP
    
16. All Magic
Function: Trade health for attack damage.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: -4 HP, +2 damage
Lvl 2: -6 HP, +4 damage
Lvl 3: -8 HP, +6 damage
    
17. Legacy
Function: Prevents item breakage and boosts health.
Level Effects:
Each prevented break: +2 max HP stack
    
18. Vengeance
Function: Shoots flaming arrows on death.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 6 arrows
Lvl 2: 12 arrows
Lvl 3: 18 arrows
    
19. Shield Reflect
Function: Heals and knocks back attackers.
Level Effects:
All levels: 2 HP heal + 1.5x knockback
    
20. Natural Regeneration
Function: Heals when not damaged for 5s.
Level Effects:
All levels: 1 HP/s regeneration
    
21. Radiance
Function: Repels mobs and provides glow.
Level Effects:
All levels: 3-block aura + glowing
    
22. Shadow Step
Function: Invisibility and speed while sneaking.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 40% speed boost
Lvl 2: 60% speed boost
Lvl 3: 80% speed boost
    
23. Wicked Step
Function: Creates poison clouds and immunity.
Level Effects:
All levels: Poison II clouds + ash trail
    
24. Swift Wind
Function: Sprint speed boost.
Level Effects:
Lvl 1: 20% speed
Lvl 2: 40% speed
Lvl 3: 60% speed
    
25. Earth Fury
Function: Ground slam attack while sprinting.
Level Effects:
All levels: 3-block knockup (1.5s cooldown)
    
26. Supremacy
Function: Knockback immunity and debuff cleanse.
Level Effects:
All levels: Full knockback resist + status immunity

And so on...

Additional Notes:
1. Under normal circumstances, Soul Strike cannot benefit from critical strike bonuses.
2. Multiple pieces of equipment enchanted with Vent Fury will only trigger Vent Fury once.
3. Vent Fury can benefit from bonuses to All Magic, Soul Strike, Critical Strikes, and Life Steal. Additionally, Soul Strike enchanted alongside Vent Fury can benefit from critical strike bonuses. However, without Vent Fury, Soul Strike, Critical Strikes, and Life Steal will have no effect on the equipment.
4. When Shadow Step is enchanted, it is advisable not to switch inventory slots while in stealth mode, as this may cause items to be lost. This issue requires further attention.
5. Legacy has detection issues when a player receives certain high-damage or high-tick damage, which may cause the effect to fail. This issue requires further attention.
6. Enchantment "CANG_MANG" , "ZHONG_ZHANG" and "ADMIRE_STARS" are not completed yet.So,it's best not to use these three enchantments until the developers of this mod improve them or you will find them not in function.
